title: paulomagnusia
side_effects: Paulomagnusia can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, vomiting, and dizziness in individuals who consume it in excessive amounts. In rare cases, prolonged use of the plant can lead to more severe side effects, including liver damage and respiratory failure. Overuse of Paulomagnusia can also interact with other medications, causing adverse reactions such as rapid heartbeat and changes in blood pressure. Furthermore, improper preparation and handling of the plant can result in skin irritation and allergic reactions in sensitive individuals.
